items.name: 柊木（来福寺）
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.subcategory: 町指定 天然記念物

en.description_en: A monument classified as a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a holly tree. It is town-designated by Asakawa Town, designated on 1979-07-05, located at Satoshiroishi Aza Dashi 363.

items.name: 「阿弥陀如来」板碑
items.subcategory: 町指定 有形文化財

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, an itabi stone stupa tablet. It is town-designated by Asakawa Town, designated on 1979-07-05, located at Aramachi 142.

items.name: 石像物『ついじの森』
items.subcategory: 町指定 有形文化財

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a group of stone figures. It is town-designated by Asakawa Town, designated on 1987-07-01, located at Minowa Aza Sakanomae 41.

items.name: 木和田塚供養塔
items.subcategory: 町指定 有形文化財

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a memorial stupa. It is town-designated by Asakawa Town, designated on 1988-09-28, located at Yamashiroishi Aza Kiwadazuka 364.

items.name: 権大僧都宥貞法印ミイラに付随する権大僧都宥貞法印入定石棺並びに入定由来書壱巻
items.subcategory: 町指定 有形文化財

en.name_romaji: Gon-daisōzu Yūtei Hōin Miira ni Fuzui suru Gon-daisōzu Yūtei Hōin Nyūjō Sekkan narabini Nyūjō Yuraisho Ichikan
en.name_en: Stone Sarcophagus and Scroll of Origin Accompanying the Mummy of Priest Yūtei Hōin
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, comprising the stone sarcophagus and a one-volume scroll of origin accompanying the mummy of the priest Yūtei Hōin. It is town-designated by Asakawa Town, designated on 1991-10-01, located at Onuki Aza Shin'yashiki 14.

items.name: 染虚空蔵菩薩
items.subcategory: 町指定 有形文化財

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, an image of the Kokūzō (Ākāśagarbha) Bodhisattva. It is town-designated by Asakawa Town, designated on 1993-04-30, located in the Some district.

items.name: 龍石山寛珠院来福寺本堂
items.subcategory: 町指定 有形文化財

en.name_en: Main Hall of Raifukuji Temple (Ryūsekizan Kanjuin)
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a temple main hall (building). It is town-designated by Asakawa Town, designated on 1996-11-01, located at Satoshiroishi Aza Dashi 363.

items.name: 浅川の花火
items.subcategory: 町指定 無形民俗文化財

en.description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, the fireworks tradition of Asakawa. It is town-designated by Asakawa Town, designated on 2001-06-01, located in the Aramachi and Honmachi districts of Asakawa Town.

items.name: 中世文書
items.subcategory: 町指定 有形文化財

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, a set of medieval documents. It is town-designated by Asakawa Town, designated on 2003-05-01, located at Asakawa Aza Aramachi 3.

items.name: お桝明神（蓑輪区）
items.subcategory: 町指定 無形民俗文化財

en.description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, a folk observance. It is town-designated by Asakawa Town, designated on 2003-05-01, located in the Minowa district.

items.name: お桝明神（染区・小貫区・太田輪区）
items.subcategory: 町指定 無形民俗文化財
items.location: 染区・小貫区・太田輪区

en.name_en: Omasu Myōjin Rite (Some, Onuki, and Ōtawa Districts)
en.description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, a folk observance. It is town-designated by Asakawa Town, designated on 2003-05-01, located in the Some, Onuki, and Ōtawa districts.

items.name: お桝明神（福貴作区）
items.subcategory: 町指定 無形民俗文化財

en.description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, a folk observance. It is town-designated by Asakawa Town, designated on 2003-05-01, located in the Fukigasaku district.

items.name: 風袋様
items.subcategory: 町指定 無形民俗文化財

en.description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, a folk observance. It is town-designated by Asakawa Town, designated on 2003-05-01, located in the Fukigasaku district.

items.name: からす餅
items.subcategory: 町指定 無形民俗文化財

en.description_en: An intangible folk cultural property, a folk observance involving rice cakes. It is town-designated by Asakawa Town, designated on 2005-03-01, located in the Higashiōhata district.
